The branch adds a default-off `mcp.servers.<name>.injectCallerContext` option that injects OpenClaw caller/session headers into opted-in remote bundle MCP servers across CLI, Codex/Gemini, embedded runtime, config schema/type, generated baseline, changelog, and unit-test surfaces.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a new feature/config PR. Current-main absence and the PR's intended behavior are source-confirmed, but after-fix real remote MCP behavior is not proven.
